headline: NANOBIOTIX Announces Presentation of First Data from a Randomized Phase 2 Clinical Trial Evaluating JNJ-1900 (NBTXR3) in Stage 3 Inoperable Lung Cancer
summary: Data presented by Johnson & Johnson at the 2026 European Lung Cancer Conference PARIS and CAMBRIDGE, Mass., March 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NANOBIOTIX (Euronext: NANO - NASDAQ: NBTX - the “Company”), a late-clinical stage biotechnology company pioneering nanotherapeutic approaches to expand treatment possibilities for patients with cancer and other major diseases, today announced the presentation of first data from the CONVERGE study, a Johnson & Johnson-sponsored randomized Phase 2 clinical
